content.title: Welcome to EZ Claps!
content.text:
A friendly ARK community built by survivors, for survivors.

We're glad you're here! Our goal is a fair, fun, and stable PvE cluster with great quality-of-life while keeping the challenge of ARK.

First Steps:
• Link your accounts to unlock the Token Shop, rewards & Discord access
• Check the Rules tab
• Join our Discord for events and announcements

Server rates and full mod list are on the website.

Good luck, Survivor! 🦖

content.title: Account Linking
content.text:
Link your in-game survivor to unlock the full experience.

How to Link:
1. Go to https://ezclaps.co.uk/ and log in with Steam, Epic or EOS
2. In-game type: !getconnectcode (twice) or use /connect in #bot-commands
3. Paste the code on the website under Settings → Alternative Connect Methods
4. Connect your Discord on the same page

Once linked you will get the @🌴 Beach Bob role and access to most channels.

Register your tribe on Discord as soon as possible!

content.title: How to Access the Shop
content.text:
How to Open the Shop:

• Radial Menu → GSA → Shop (Or press F6 on PC)
• You can also use the shop directly on our Community Website.

Useful Bot Commands (in #bot-commands channel only):
• /claim → Claim tokens after voting
• /votelist → Show vote list
• /connect → Link your account
• /pay → Send tokens to another player
• /players → List online players
• /servers → Check server status

content.title: Tokens & Discounts
content.text:
Tokens are the main currency. They are transferable between players.

How to Earn Tokens:
• New Player: 100 Tokens (after linking)
• Playtime: 50 Tokens per hour
• Voting: 50 Tokens per vote
• Weekly Bonus: +200 Tokens at 15 votes
• Events: Up to 10,000 Tokens possible

Discount Tiers (playtime based):
Survivor 5% → Hunter 10% → Pathfinder 15% → Beastmaster 20% → Alpha 25% → Apex Legend 30%

content.title: Voting
content.text:
Help the cluster grow and earn Tokens!

You can vote 3 times per day.

Recommended Maps (concentrate votes here):
• The Island
• Ragnarok
• Lost Colony

How to Vote:
• ark-servers.net
• In-game: Radial menu or F7
• Website: ezclaps.co.uk
• Discord: /votelist then /claim

Rewards:
• 50 Tokens per vote
• +200 Tokens weekly bonus at 15 votes

Thank you for voting!

content.title: Gen 1 Launch Event
content.text:
As with all new story maps, dino and gear transfers will be disabled for the first month after Gen 1 releases. Only naked character transfers will be allowed.

The in-game shop will also be temporarily disabled during this period.

We do this to give everyone a fresh-start feeling and let players experience the new map as originally intended.

content.title: Launch Challenge
content.text:
🏆 The first tribe to ascend on Gen 1 will receive:

• A personal Gas Vein at their base
• A personal Oil Vein at their base
• A personal Water Vein at their base
• 10,000 Reward Tokens

Solo players are also rewarded! The first solo player to ascend will receive the exact same rewards.

Good luck to everyone taking on the race!

content.title: General Rules
content.text:
• Respect others - No hate speech, harassment or toxicity
• No cheating, hacks, dupes or exploits
• No griefing or trolling
• Do not steal eggs or unclaimed babies
• Report bugs, don't exploit them

content.title: Building & Breeding
content.text:
• Use Propagator for breeding when possible
• Max 30-50 breeders out at once if breeding manually
• Excessive unpodded tames left as yard ornaments may be cryoed by an admin to reduce lag.
• Turn mating OFF when offline
• Remove temporary taming traps after use
• Don't block spawns, obelisks, terminals, explorer notes or major resources
• Remove old or unused structures
• Excessive clutter or lag-causing builds may be removed
• Gas and Oil pumps must remain public

content.title: Tribe Rules
content.text:
• One tribe name on the cluster
• No Human names
• One main base + small outpost (max 4x4) per map
• Avoid building too close to other tribes

content.title: Replacement Policy
content.text:
Admins only replace items/dinos lost due to direct admin error.

We do NOT replace losses from:
• Deaths (AFK, dehydration, starvation, crashes, disconnects)
• Lost bags or despawns
• Normal gameplay risks or player negligence
